title: Core Harness
subtitle: ai_studio/core_harness
description: Harness, agent-facing contract, AGENTS.md, root compatibility surfaces, passive profiling, and the smallest public entry points needed to start work.

children.description: Core Harness module contract: what belongs in the always-nearby harness, what is only a compatibility surface, and how Core routes into workflow, orchestration, and validation.
Repo-level harness contract loaded by agents: repository role, AI Studio direction, current-game routing, hard invariants, and context routes.
Compatibility pointer for Claude-facing harnesses; should stay generated or thin and route back to AGENTS.md.

children.title: Agent Role Catalogs
children.description: Groups reusable Codex and Claude role definitions consumed by repository orchestration.

children.title: .codex/agents/
children.description: Defines reusable Codex roles for repository orchestration.

children.title: .claude/agents/
children.description: Defines reusable Claude roles for repository orchestration.

children.title: Workflow
children.subtitle: task execution order
children.description: Core Harness workflow group: local process for context loading, work loop, validation handoff, and delegation checkpoint.
children.role: agent task workflow inside the harness

children.description: Canonical Workflow contract: context policy, lead-agent work loop, validation handoff, and delegation checkpoint.

children.title: Orchestration
children.subtitle: early subagent split
children.description: Child rule inside Workflow for broad read-heavy work. Keeps subagent use lightweight with Task / Scope / Return / Stop packets; it is not a product, task store, or public CLI.
children.role: workflow delegation trigger and packet shape

children.description: Short orchestration contract: when to split work, the simple packet format, lead responsibility, and boundary with Workflow and Taskboard.

children.title: Utility Skills
children.subtitle: cross-cutting agent workflows
children.description: Self-contained Codex skills for reusable agent workflows that do not belong to one AI Studio product module.

children.title: nt-app-tunnel
children.description: Self-contained skill for sharing local self-contained static directories, AI Studio surfaces, asset exports, or wasm game builds through a temporary public cloudflared tunnel.

children.title: nt-game-ui-layout
children.description: Self-contained skill for in-game UI layout work: forces engine widget/mode inventory, game-local analog discovery, and runtime visual proof before agents edit layout.

children.title: nt-game-feature
children.description: Routes reusable feature-pack and game-local module ownership decisions.

children.title: nt-game-items
children.description: Routes item catalog, ownership, validation, and runtime integration work.

children.title: Agent Surfaces
children.subtitle: generated Codex/Claude surfaces
children.description: Core Harness module for generated agent-facing compatibility surfaces: Claude skill pointers and Codex/Claude hook configs.
children.role: agent surface generation and drift checks

children.title: README.md
children.description: Agent Surfaces contract: canonical sources, generated outputs, command entrypoints, and module boundaries.

children.title: sync.mjs
children.description: Public Agent Surfaces facade that regenerates or checks all generated Codex/Claude compatibility files.

children.title: skills_sync.mjs
children.description: Generates .claude/skills thin pointers from Codex-discoverable .codex/skills entrypoints and removes stale generated pointers.

children.title: hooks_sync.mjs
children.description: Generates .codex/hooks.json and the hooks block of .claude/settings.json from one canonical hook source.

children.title: Generated Outputs
children.subtitle: Codex/Claude compatibility files
children.description: Generated compatibility files produced by Agent Surfaces. Edit the canonical source, not these outputs.

children.title: .codex/hooks.json
children.description: Generated Codex hook configuration rendered from hooks_sync.mjs.

children.title: .claude/settings.json
children.description: Generated Claude hook configuration. hooks_sync.mjs preserves Claude-only keys while replacing the hooks block.

children.title: .claude/skills/
children.description: Generated Claude skill pointer directory. Each pointer routes to the matching Codex-discoverable .codex/skills entrypoint.

children.title: Tests
children.subtitle: sync regressions
children.description: Verifies agent surface contracts files.

children.title: skills_sync.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies skills sync contracts.

children.title: hooks_sync.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies hooks sync contracts.

children.title: Profiling
children.subtitle: passive session telemetry
children.description: Core Harness profiling group: passive hook telemetry, Codex session recovery, status reports, subagent diagnostics, and NT chat-session reflection ownership.
children.role: agent execution observability inside the harness

children.title: README.md
children.description: Profiling module contract: Agent Surfaces owns hook config; Profiling owns recorder commands, status reports, Codex recovery, and reflection skill instructions.

children.title: status.mjs
children.description: Reads per-session profile JSONL and reports command durations, slow work, repeated commands, failures, coverage gaps, and optional subagent diagnostics.

children.title: hook_record.mjs
children.description: Provides profiling hook recorder fallback.

children.title: hook_record_fast.c
children.description: Native fast hook recorder source for low-overhead SessionStart, PreToolUse, and PostToolUse command telemetry.

children.title: hook_record_fast.exe
children.description: Built Windows fast hook recorder used by generated Codex and Claude hook configs.

children.title: build_hook_record_fast.mjs
children.description: Build helper for the native fast hook recorder.

children.title: profile_lib.mjs
children.description: Shared profile path, JSONL, parsing, timestamp, command, and record helpers used by profiling commands.

children.title: agent_rollup.mjs
children.description: Best-effort subagent transcript diagnostics for Claude and Codex sessions. Diagnostic only, not an acceptance gate.

children.title: requirements-full.txt
children.description: Pinned optional Python dependencies for profiling-related full gates that need Pillow, NumPy, or SciPy.

children.title: NT Chat Session Reflection Skill
children.subtitle: session retrospective instructions
children.description: Skill instructions for full retrospective analysis of long AI-assisted sessions using durable evidence, profiling telemetry, and chat/session context.

children.title: profiling.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies profiling contracts.

children.title: Validation
children.subtitle: fast route checks
children.description: Fast Core Harness validation for agent-facing docs and stale file references. Module test suites stay with their owning modules.
children.role: core harness route and reference guard

children.description: Core validation contract: fast mechanical checks only; no global pipeline validation.
Mechanical guard for stale local references and missing files in agent-facing Markdown.
Verifies stale reference guard contracts.

children.title: Tool Lib
children.subtitle: shared command helpers
children.description: Core Harness helper library for low-level AI Studio command-line tools: CLI failure paths, JSON IO, hashing, MIME lookup, and tmp scratch cleanup. It is intentionally policy-free.
children.role: shared AI Studio tool helper library

children.title: README.md
children.description: Tool Lib contract: low-level helper ownership, boundaries, and what must not live in this shared layer.

children.title: studio_config.mjs
children.description: Provides studio config reader.

children.title: studio.config.json
children.description: Committed studio-wide configuration (schema ai_studio.studio_config.v1). Currently sets canvasProjectsRoot, the on-disk home for canvas projects. A per-machine studio.config.local.json (gitignored) overrides fields.

children.title: cli.mjs
children.description: Shared low-level cli helper used by AI Studio command-line modules.

children.title: cli.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies shared cli helper contracts.

children.title: hash.mjs
children.description: Shared low-level hash helper used by AI Studio command-line modules.

children.title: json.mjs
children.description: Shared low-level json helper used by AI Studio command-line modules.

children.title: json.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies shared json helper contracts.

children.title: mime.mjs
children.description: Shared low-level mime helper used by AI Studio command-line modules.

children.title: mime.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies shared mime helper contracts.

children.title: tmp_sweep.mjs
children.description: Opt-in housekeeping command for reporting or deleting ignored `tmp/` scratch data while keeping the newest pipeline validation exports.

children.title: tmp_sweep.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies tmp scratch cleanup command contracts.
